title: OMP Memory Object
description: Open Memory Protocol v0.1 — canonical schema for a memory object

content.description: The memory content in plain natural language

tool.description: Identifier of the AI tool that created this memory

session_id.description: Optional session or conversation ID from the source tool

user_id.description: Optional user identifier within the source tool

timestamp.description: When this memory was observed (ISO 8601 UTC)

tags.description: Arbitrary tags for filtering and organisation

created_at.description: When this memory was created in the OMP server (ISO 8601 UTC)

updated_at.description: When this memory was last updated (ISO 8601 UTC)

expires_at.description: When this memory expires and should be deleted. Null means never.

embedding.description: Optional vector embedding of content for semantic search

metadata.description: Optional tool-specific extra data. Values must be JSON-serialisable.
